entities.name: GENEBANK
entities.description: Facilities that conserve ex situ collections of plant genetic resources

entities.name: EX SITU COLLECTIONS
entities.description: Collections of genetic material maintained outside their natural habitats

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT PROGRAMS
entities.description: Initiatives aimed at enhancing the genetic quality and productivity of crops

entities.name: MANUAL OF GENEBANK OPERATIONS AND PROCEDURES
entities.description: A technical document providing practices and procedures for genebank operations

entities.name: GENETIC RESOURCES
entities.description: Genetic material of plant species used for breeding and conservation

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of altering the genetic makeup of a crop to improve its characteristics

entities.name: MINI CORE COLLECTION
entities.description: A small, representative subset of a genebank collection that captures maximum diversity

entities.name: INTERNATIONAL PUBLIC GOODS
entities.description: Resources that are non-excludable and non-rivalrous, available to the global community

entities.name: GERMPLASM
entities.description: Living genetic resources such as seeds or tissues used for breeding

entities.name: ASSESSMENT OF DIVERSITY
entities.description: The process of evaluating the genetic variation within a population or collection

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC CHARACTERIZATION
entities.description: The evaluation of observable physical traits of an organism

entities.name: MOLECULAR CHARACTERIZATION
entities.description: The evaluation of genetic variation using molecular markers

entities.name: TRAIT-SPECIFIC GERMPLASM
entities.description: Germplasm selected for possessing specific desired traits

entities.name: INTERNATIONAL TREATY ON PLANT GENETIC RESOURCES FOR FOOD AND AGRICULTURE
entities.description: A global agreement to facilitate the conservation and sharing of plant genetic resources

entities.name: MANDATE CROPS
entities.description: The specific set of crops that ICRISAT is tasked with improving

entities.name: SMALL MILLETS
entities.description: A group of small-seeded grasses used as food crops
